kit_catalog_items.name: Water purification tablets (50-count)
kit_catalog_items.description: Tablets for disinfecting untreated water in emergencies.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Use according to instructions; wait time typically 30 minutes.

kit_catalog_items.name: Bottled water, 1-gallon jugs (3-pack)
kit_catalog_items.description: Sealed 1-gallon jugs of drinking water.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Plan for at least 1 gallon per person per day.

kit_catalog_items.name: Electrolyte drink powder packets
kit_catalog_items.description: Single-serve electrolyte packets to mix with clean water.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Helpful for heat-related emergencies and illness.

kit_catalog_items.name: Emergency drinking water pouches (12-pack)
kit_catalog_items.description: Long-shelf-life foil water pouches.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Store in a cool, dark place; check expiration dates.

kit_catalog_items.name: Instant oatmeal packets (10-pack)
kit_catalog_items.description: Individual oatmeal packets that can be prepared with hot water.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Choose low-sugar options when possible.

kit_catalog_items.name: Canned beans (3-pack)
kit_catalog_items.description: Ready-to-eat canned beans with easy-open lids.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Include a manual can opener if cans are not easy-open.

kit_catalog_items.name: Peanut butter (16 oz jar)
kit_catalog_items.description: High-calorie, shelf-stable protein source.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Check for nut allergies in the household.

kit_catalog_items.name: Granola bars (12-count)
kit_catalog_items.description: Individually wrapped snack bars for quick calories.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Choose varieties that meet dietary needs (gluten-free, etc.).

kit_catalog_items.name: Ready-to-eat emergency meal pouches (3-pack)
kit_catalog_items.description: Shelf-stable meals that can be eaten hot or cold.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Some kits include heating elements; follow instructions carefully.

kit_catalog_items.name: 7-day pill organizer
kit_catalog_items.description: Weekly pill organizer for managing daily medications.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Label clearly and update when medications change.

kit_catalog_items.name: Pain reliever (acetaminophen)
kit_catalog_items.description: Over-the-counter pain and fever reducer.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Follow dosing instructions; keep out of reach of children.

kit_catalog_items.name: N95 respirator masks (10-pack)
kit_catalog_items.description: NIOSH-approved N95 respirators for smoke, dust, and illness protection.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Fit must be tight to be effective; not sized for young children.

kit_catalog_items.name: Basic first aid kit
kit_catalog_items.description: Includes bandages, antiseptic wipes, gauze, and basic supplies.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Customize with personal medications and supplies.

kit_catalog_items.name: Emergency whistle
kit_catalog_items.description: Loud safety whistle for signaling in emergencies.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Attach to a lanyard or go-bag for quick access.

kit_catalog_items.name: Duct tape (roll)
kit_catalog_items.description: Multi-purpose duct tape for temporary repairs and sealing.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Useful for shelter-in-place sealing and basic repairs.

kit_catalog_items.name: Work gloves (pair)
kit_catalog_items.description: Durable gloves to protect hands during cleanup.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Choose appropriate sizes for each adult.

kit_catalog_items.name: LED flashlight with batteries
kit_catalog_items.description: Battery-powered LED flashlight for power outages.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Store extra batteries in original packaging.

kit_catalog_items.name: Wet wipes (40-count)
kit_catalog_items.description: Moist wipes for basic cleaning when water is limited.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Avoid flushing; dispose of wipes in trash.

kit_catalog_items.name: Toilet tissue (4-roll pack)
kit_catalog_items.description: Basic toilet paper for sanitation needs.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Store in a dry place to prevent damage.

kit_catalog_items.name: Hand sanitizer (8 oz)
kit_catalog_items.description: Alcohol-based hand sanitizer for hand hygiene.
kit_catalog_items.notes: Choose products with at least 60% alcohol.

locations.name: Mission Community Cooling Center
locations.notes: Pets allowed in carriers; bottled water available.

locations.name: Potrero Hill Neighborhood Cooling Center
locations.notes: Located inside the Potrero Hill Recreation Center.

locations.name: Bernal Heights Recreation Cooling Site
locations.notes: Community room used as designated cooling space during heat alerts.

locations.name: SoMa Civic Cooling Center
locations.notes: Located at the Civic Center Community Facility.

locations.name: Bayview Hunters Point Cooling Center
locations.notes: Priority seating for older adults and people with disabilities.

locations.name: Mission Emergency Shelter
locations.notes: Activated during major emergencies; call ahead to confirm status.

locations.name: San Francisco Disaster Resource Center
locations.notes: Provides information, referrals, and emergency supplies when activated.

locations.name: SF General Hospital Vaccination Clinic
locations.notes: Offers flu and COVID-19 vaccines by appointment and walk-in.

locations.name: Seattle Downtown Cooling Center
locations.notes: Open during National Weather Service heat advisories.
typical_services: pet cooling area (service animals and pets in carriers)

locations.name: King County Emergency Operations Center
locations.notes: Coordinates countywide response; not open to the general public except for scheduled tours.

locations.name: Rainier Valley Resource Center
locations.notes: Provides disaster recovery case management and referral services.

locations.name: North Seattle Emergency Shelter
locations.notes: Shelter is activated during major weather and disaster events.

population_segments.name: Older Adults (65+)
population_segments.description: Resources and guidance for adults aged 65 and older, including those with chronic health conditions.

population_segments.name: Parents & Caregivers
population_segments.description: Preparedness and recovery resources for parents, guardians, and caregivers of children.

population_segments.name: Households with Children
population_segments.description: Tools and checklists to help families with children prepare for emergencies.

population_segments.name: General Public
population_segments.description: Foundational emergency preparedness guidance for anyone.

population_segments.name: Workplaces & Offices
population_segments.description: Resources for employers, managers, and employees in office and workplace settings.

resources.title: Family Flu & Pandemic Preparedness Checklist (Households with Children)
resources.description: Step-by-step checklist to help families with children prepare for seasonal flu and future pandemics, including school closure planning and child-friendly activities.

resources.title: School Flu & Respiratory Outbreak Response Checklist
resources.description: Operational checklist for schools and childcare programs to prepare for and respond to flu and respiratory disease outbreaks.

resources.title: Staying Safe in Extreme Heat: Guidance for Older Adults (65+)
resources.description: Detailed guidance for adults 65 and older on preparing for and staying safe during heatwaves, including hydration tips and when to seek medical help.

resources.title: Flood Preparedness and Evacuation Guide for Older Adults (65+)
resources.description: Step-by-step guide for older adults on how to prepare for floods, protect medications and equipment, and safely evacuate.

resources.title: Earthquake Safety in the Workplace: Drop, Cover, and Hold On (Poster)
resources.description: Single-page printable poster for offices showing what to do before, during, and after an earthquake.

resources.title: Fire Evacuation Steps for Offices (Single-Page Poster)
resources.description: Printable fire evacuation poster for workplaces, including evacuation routes, assembly areas, and reminders not to use elevators.

resources.title: 24/7 Parent Support Line for Children After Disasters
resources.description: Confidential, 24/7 hotline for parents and caregivers seeking guidance on supporting children’s mental health after a natural disaster.

resources.title: Disaster Recovery Helpline for Parents & Caregivers (24/7)
resources.description: A national, toll-free disaster recovery helpline offering immediate emotional support and referrals for parents and caregivers impacted by hurricanes, floods, fires, and other disasters.

resources.title: Crisis Counseling Line for Parents After Earthquakes and Storms
resources.description: 24-hour crisis counseling by phone or text for parents coping with their own and their children’s reactions after earthquakes, severe storms, and other disasters.

resources.title: Family Emergency Communication Plan Template
resources.description: Printable template to record household contacts, meeting places, and important information for emergencies.

resources.title: Workplace Emergency Action Plan Template
resources.description: Editable template to help workplaces develop an all-hazards emergency action plan, including evacuation, shelter-in-place, and communication procedures.

resources.title: Wildfire Smoke & Air Quality: Frequently Asked Questions
resources.description: Answers to common questions about staying safe during wildfire smoke events, including mask use and indoor air quality.

resources.title: Earthquake Preparedness Checklist for Small Offices
resources.description: Checklist to help small businesses and office workplaces secure equipment, protect employees, and plan for earthquake response.

resources.title: Protecting Children During Heatwaves: Fact Sheet for Parents & Caregivers
resources.description: One-page fact sheet on how to keep children safe during extreme heat, including signs of heat illness and tips for outdoor activities.

training_events.title: Emergency Preparedness 101 (Online, Beginner)
training_events.description: Introductory online training covering basic emergency preparedness for households, including building a kit and making a plan.

training_events.title: Family Emergency Communication Planning (Online)
training_events.description: Hands-on beginner session to help you create a family communication plan, including out-of-area contacts and meeting locations.

training_events.title: Build Your 3-Day Emergency Kit (Online Workshop)
training_events.description: Beginner-friendly online workshop on assembling a budget-conscious 3-day emergency supply kit.

training_events.title: Advanced Incident Command System (ICS) Workshop
training_events.description: In-depth training for emergency managers and responders on advanced ICS concepts and applications.
training_events.location_description: City Emergency Operations Center, Training Room A

training_events.title: Community Shelter Operations Training
training_events.description: Hybrid training for volunteers and staff on setting up and operating community emergency shelters.
training_events.location_description: Hybrid - Online and at Downtown Community Center

training_events.title: Planning Workplace Fire & Earthquake Drills
training_events.description: Beginner-level in-person course for safety coordinators on designing and running effective fire and earthquake drills.

training_events.title: Wildfire Smoke & Air Quality Preparedness Briefing
training_events.description: Online briefing for all community members on staying safe during wildfire smoke episodes.

training_events.title: Community Emergency Response Team (CERT) Basic Training
training_events.description: Multi-day in-person CERT training covering fire safety, disaster medical operations, light search and rescue, and team organization.

training_events.title: Emergency Preparedness Basics (Recorded Webinar)
training_events.description: Recorded webinar introducing core household preparedness concepts. Available on-demand.

training_events.title: Intro to Neighborhood Preparedness (In-Person)
training_events.description: Beginner introduction to organizing neighborhood emergency teams. This session was cancelled and will be rescheduled.
